servers.name: Avia Client
servers.description: Welcome to AviaClient. The One Modded Client for stoat you will need. We feature Plugins/Quickcss/Themes to stoat. If you like vencord on discord but miss it on stoat. This Client is the Client you need to be using #clientmod #aviaclient #mod #client #plugins #themes #quickcss #aviaclient

servers.name: Stoat
servers.description: Official server run by the team behind Stoat (formerly Revolt). General conversation and support server. Appeals and reports: lounge@stoat.chat #stoat #revolt

servers.name: The New Citadel
servers.description: Originally created as a discord server for The MrGXT YouTube channel The New Citadel or TNC for short has evolved into a place where everyone is welcome. With community events, Game nights, and DnD Campaigns there is something for everyone and if events aren’t your thing take a minute make conversation with some of our members in Voice chat or General. And if you help hosting your own event on our server we’ll help you. #gaming #youtube #chill #community
